title: Architrave UI per-repo config
description: Declares how Architrave UI retargets its agents, gates, and platform knowledge for one repo. Lives at the repo root as uikit.config.json. UI-only; backend/IaC is out of scope.

platform.description: Selects the knowledge pack the Platform Design agent loads.

stack.description: UI framework used to implement the design natively.

designSource.description: Where the canonical design lives (the thing to reproduce, never reinvent).

path.description: Repo-relative path to the design workbench (e.g. src/Admin/.storybook, ui-lab).

url.description: Optional running/published Storybook URL (e.g. http://localhost:6007 or a gh-pages demo).

spec.description: Optional repo-relative path to a written design spec (e.g. docs/ui/*-design-spec.md).

designMap.description: Optional repo-relative path to the component glossary / ui-map (e.g. docs/design/phonodeck-ui-map.json). Source of truth for component names.

tokens.description: Optional repo-relative path to the design tokens file(s) in W3C DTCG format (*.tokens.json). The single source of truth for design<->code reconciliation.

tokenBuild.description: Optional command that regenerates platform code from tokens (e.g. Style Dictionary / Terrazzo). Used by the reconcile gate.

knowledgePack.description: Override which knowledge pack to load. Defaults to the one implied by platform.

applyTo.description: Globs where the UI lives. Scopes the Architrave UI instructions/agents inside a mixed repo (so the backend lane is untouched).

build.description: Build command (e.g. 'make build', 'npm run build', 'dotnet build').

test.description: Test command (e.g. 'make test', 'npx playwright test', 'dotnet test').

screenshot.description: Optional command/recipe that captures a screenshot to compare against the Storybook reference.
